npu.name: Qwen3 8B (INT4-CW)
npu.notes: Recommended (proven). Best quality verified for NPU.

npu.name: Phi 3.5 Mini (INT4-CW)
npu.notes: Proven. Smaller and faster than Qwen3 8B, lower quality.

npu.name: DeepSeek R1 Distill 1.5B (INT4-CW)
npu.notes: Tested: works but terrible quality. Smoke-test/dev use only.

npu.name: DeepSeek R1 Distill 7B (INT4-CW)
npu.notes: Untested. Marketed as reasoning-focused — verify before relying on it.

gpu_vlm.name: Qwen3.5 4B (INT4)
gpu_vlm.notes: Experimental. Newest Qwen generation, natively multimodal (image-text-to-text) — full VLM on GPU. Untested here; needs OpenVINO 2026.2+.

gpu_vlm.name: Qwen3.5 9B (INT4)
gpu_vlm.notes: Experimental. Qwen3.5 generation, natively multimodal (image-text-to-text) — full VLM on GPU. Untested here; needs OpenVINO 2026.2+.

gpu_vlm.name: Qwen3-VL 8B (INT4)
gpu_vlm.notes: Recommended. Newer Qwen-VL generation. Verified on Xe-LPG iGPU for OCR, color/count, no hallucination on empty input. Like all VLMs, prone to confident hallucination on ambiguous images (e.g., invented make/model/year from unbadged photos) — prompt for visible features only and ask for uncertainty explicitly.

gpu_vlm.name: Qwen3-VL 8B (INT8)
gpu_vlm.notes: Untested. INT8 variant of the recommended Qwen3-VL — retains OCR/number detail better than INT4 at ~9 GB. Try if INT4 loses fine text.

gpu_vlm.name: Qwen2.5-VL 3B (INT8, convert)
gpu_vlm.notes: Recommended (proven). INT8 retains fine detail (OCR, numbers) better than INT4. Needs conversion (~10 min).

gpu_vlm.name: Gemma 3 12B Vision (INT4)
gpu_vlm.notes: Untested. Needs ~12 GB RAM with KV cache.

gpu_vlm.name: Gemma 4 E2B Vision (INT4)
gpu_vlm.notes: Untested. Google Gemma 4 — efficient (E2B effective-2B) successor to Gemma 3. Needs OpenVINO 2026.2+.

whisper.name: Whisper Base (INT8)
whisper.notes: Fastest. Multi-language. Pre-exported — instant install, no conversion step.

whisper.name: Whisper Small (INT8)
whisper.notes: Good balance. Multi-language. Pre-exported — instant install.

whisper.name: Whisper Medium (INT8)
whisper.notes: Best accuracy under 16 GB. Multi-language. Pre-exported — instant install.

gpu_llm.name: Qwen3.6 27B (INT4)
gpu_llm.notes: Untested. Newest generation, natively multimodal. ~16 GB int4 — borderline on a 16 GB Arc, may fall back to CPU silently like the 30B-A3B. Needs OpenVINO 2026.2+.

gpu_llm.name: Qwen3 30B-A3B MoE (INT4)
gpu_llm.notes: Best quality. Needs >32 GB RAM (shared with system).

gpu_llm.name: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B MoE (INT4)
gpu_llm.notes: Code-focused MoE. Needs >32 GB RAM (shared with system).
